---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE]"
labels: enhancement
assignees: DogeTennant

---

**What would you like to see added or changed?**
A clear description of the feature or improvement.

**Why would this be useful?**
Explain the use case - who benefits and how.

**Any implementation ideas?**
Optional. If you have thoughts on how it could work, share them here.

**Additional context**
Any other notes, screenshots or examples.
